summary: Full E2E test of FileMorph: 17/17 backend pytest tests passed + frontend flows (landing, auth, dashboard, convert, editor, pricing checkout) all functional. Tested PNG/TXT conversions, image edits, PDF merge/split, Stripe checkout for plan+pack, and 5/day free-plan limit (6th returns 402).

issues: File input has data-testid='file-input' but element is hidden (display:hidden) — playwright wait_for_selector(visible) fails. Tests must use set_input_files directly without visibility wait. Consider exposing a programmatic-accessible attribute or use the label/dropzone testid.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~544 lines — borderline; consider splitting routes (auth/files/convert/edit/billing) into separate modules if app grows.
_consume_credit() loads full user doc just to read usage; could project only {usage:1}.
CORSMiddleware uses allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True — browsers ignore credentials with wildcard; explicit origin from env is safer for cookie-auth.
/api/billing/checkout reads origin_url from request body — fine, but consider validating it against a trusted host allow-list to prevent open-redirect via success_url.
/api/webhook/stripe returns 200 even when webhook handler raises — acceptable for Stripe retry semantics, but log level should be error not warning when signature fails.
test_credentials: admin@filemorph.app / admin123 (seeded by backend startup). /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty — main agent should populate it.
seed_data_creation: None — backend seeds admin user on startup; tests create transient users via /api/auth/register for daily-limit test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 17 review items and passes. Frontend file inputs are hidden — use page.set_input_files on 'input#file-input' or 'input[type=file]' directly. Convert button label is dynamic: 'CONVERT TO .{ext} →'. Editor upload button is 'UPLOAD →' (not 'UPLOAD FILE →' as on /convert). All Stripe sessions return 200 with test key sk_test_emergent.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 21 review checklist items verified successfully.
